title: cyclophorus flocculosus
intro: Cyclophorus flocculosus, also known as the hairy cyclophorus, is a species of plant in the family Cyclophoridae, which is commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclophorus flocculosus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. It is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies, and can be found in various forms, including dried roots and leaves, and liquid extracts.
